title: Smoky Spanish Sausage-Free Paella
description: A flavorful, vegan take on traditional Spanish paella, using smoky sausages alternatives and a variety of vegetables.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the mixed bell peppers and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the smoked vegan sausages and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the Spanish-style rice, smoked paprika, salt, and vegetable broth. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes and stir to combine. Cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
